name: Weight-Adjusted Gradients Reveal Parameter Importance and Failure Modes in LLMs
summary: arXiv:2607.10803v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding which parameters are influential in Large Language Models (LLMs) is central to improving their efficiency, reliability, and interpret...
description: arXiv:2607.10803v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding which parameters are influential in Large Language Models (LLMs) is central to improving their efficiency, reliability, and interpretability. We introduce Weight-Adjusted Gradients (WAG), a simple yet effective approach for estimating parameter importance that explicitly captures the interaction between model weights and first-orde...
author: Shrestha Datta, Hongfu Liu, Anshuman Chhabra
